allow: Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql -u root controlhorario_cmw -e "SHOW TABLES; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as ''Filas en empleados_anual'' FROM empleados_anual; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as ''Filas en empleados_resumen'' FROM empleados_resumen;")
Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql -u root controlhorario_cmw -e "ALTER TABLE empleados_anual DISCARD TABLESPACE;")
Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql -u root controlhorario_cmw -e "ALTER TABLE empleados_resumen DISCARD TABLESPACE;")
Bash(/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql -u root controlhorario_cmw --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -e "SELECT DISTINCT dia_semana, HEX\(dia_semana\) FROM empleados_anual;")
